case_title: KYLE DURFEE ET AL VS. REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO FEB-02-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KYLE DURFEE (HUSBAND) IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CAROLYN DURFEE (WIFE) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY J.J. PANZER (BUSINESS OWNER). DEFENDANT CHRISTINE HILL IS PRESENT. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DURFEE, KYLE REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY HILL, CHRISTINE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2023 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); [AGENT FOR SERVICE: JOHN FEDELE] SERVED NOV-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF KYLE DURFEE (HUSBAND) IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CAROLYN DURFEE (WIFE) IS NOT PRESENT AND IS REPRESENTED BY KYLE DURFEE (HUSBAND). DEFENDANT REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY J.J. PANZER (PRESIDENT). DEFENDANT CHRISTINE HILL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DURFEE, KYLE DURFEE, CAROLYN AS TO DEFENDANT REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY HILL, CHRISTINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED NOV-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, CHRISTINE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) J. J. PANZER (BUSINESS OWNER) FILED BY DEFENDANT REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KYLE DURFEE, HUSBAND. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DURFEE, CAROLYN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DURFEE, KYLE DURFEE, CAROLYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY HILL, CHRISTINE ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFFS OFFERED EVIDENCE THAT CERTAIN PROPERTY ITEMS WERE DAMAGES BY THE FUMES THAT ENTERED THEIR RENTAL UNIT AS A RESULT OF THE WOOD REPAIR WORK, PLAINTIFF DID NOT DEMONSTRATE TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT THE NAMED DEFENDANTS ARE THE PARTIES RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY PROVEN DAMAGES. THE PROPERTY IS AN HOA COMMUNITY AND IT APPEARS FROM THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED THAT THE CONTRACTOR WHO PERFORMED THE WORK WAS HIRED BY THE HOA AND NOT EITHER OF THE DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DURFEE, KYLE DURFEE, CAROLYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY HILL, CHRISTINE ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFFS OFFERED EVIDENCE THAT CERTAIN PROPERTY ITEMS WERE DAMAGES BY THE FUMES THAT ENTERED THEIR RENTAL UNIT AS A RESULT OF THE WOOD REPAIR WORK, PLAINTIFF DID NOT DEMONSTRATE TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT THE NAMED DEFENDANTS ARE THE PARTIES RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY PROVEN DAMAGES. THE PROPERTY IS AN HOA COMMUNITY AND IT APPEARS FROM THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED THAT THE CONTRACTOR WHO PERFORMED THE WORK WAS HIRED BY THE HOA AND NOT EITHER OF THE DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
